methodology: 2024: precinct-level presidential results (VEST in_2024) reassigned to 2010 district boundaries via point-in-polygon using precinct polygon bbox centroids. 2020: county-level results apportioned to 2010 districts using county-to-district weights derived from the same precinct spatial assignments — enables 2020 margins for all chambers including House (unlike the current-boundary view). IN-Index = average of 2020 and 2024 margins. Representatives shown are those who held office in 2009-2011.
